name: compliance closed-loop step subagent-consult invokes the compliance-specialist subagent for an interpretation
command:
mkdir -p agents && printf 'name: compliance-specialist
model: opus
prompt_id: compliance-specialist
prompt_version: 1.0
description: x
' > agents/compliance-specialist.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step subagent-consult --agent-dir agents --question "interpret control" --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'compliance_specialist_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
